text.message: yeah I played the worst game ever
I had to report this dude because they gave the game away
through several terrible plays over and over and over
why are you even playing ranked at that point you know?
I dont play ranked cause I am working too
I just have to be able to quit and not focus lol
road means nothing until end game
lost half my cards and robbed
sorry orange it was't meant to be intentional
but you leave red with brick port
ohhh i didnt see that tbh
Blue can we get you three roads to plow the desert?
we lose if you don't plow the desert
like the points don't matter if you just lose
I get the city is nice but it does not actually do anything
maybe we will rob you out of the win
the game might want to end it too
that Dev card should end it tbh
